name: Turkey

avoid: July — peak domestic tourism, crowded fjords and higher prices

Plan for rain in Bergen — notoriously wet year-round
Northern Lights need clear skies — have a backup night booked

cities.name: Honolulu
cities.notes: Waikiki Beach, Diamond Head crater hike, Pearl Harbor and Iolani Palace

cities.name: Maui
cities.notes: Haleakala volcano sunrise, Road to Hana waterfalls and whale watching

cities.name: Big Island
cities.notes: Active Kilauea lava flows, manta ray night dive and Waipio black sand valley

cities.name: Kauai
cities.notes: Na Pali Coast sea cliffs, Waimea Canyon and Hanalei Bay sunset beach

cities.name: Lanai
cities.notes: Secluded island with Munro Trail, Hulopoe Bay snorkeling and rock gardens
